name: Background Generator Pro
description: Create beautiful gradients, solid colors, patterns, and backgrounds instantly. Apply to any webpage, copy CSS or Tailwind code, and save your favorite designs.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https://loremflickr.com; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'none';
